14 Robert St, Collingwood
july.com
17 October 219
To Whom it May Concern
This letter is to confirm that “ABC” is a sub- contractor of July,
and is authorised to develop and produce products using the
brand name “July”.
All parties shall maintain the secrecy of the all the confidential
information supplied by July.
This confirmation is valid until 31 December 2020.
Should anyone has any queries relating to this letter, please
contact xxx.
Yours sincerely,
Richard
CEO
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
